message:
feat: Implement real PyPI provider with h2 HTTP client

- pypi_provider.zig: Real implementation instead of stubs
  - getVersions(): Fetches from https://pypi.org/pypi/{package}/json
  - getDependencies(): Fetches requires_dist from PyPI JSON API
  - Uses h2.Client for HTTPS requests
  - Parses JSON response to extract version keys and dependencies
  - Proper caching with lazy HTTP client initialization
  - PEP 508 dependency parsing via pep508.parseDependency()
